---
title: "Bioinformatics Analysis Report"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    theme: none
    page-layout: custom
    include-in-header: styles.html
    include-before-body: sidebar.html
    include-after-body: footer.html
    embed-resources: false
    smooth-scroll: true
    fig-responsive: true
    link-color: '#264882'
---

``````{=html}
<div class="masthead">
  <div class="masthead-top">
    <h1>Project Title<br><strong>Analysis Report</strong></h1>
    <div class="masthead-pipeline">
      <span>pipeline</span>Workflow v1.0
      <span>operator</span>Your Name
      <span>reference</span>Reference
      <span>cluster</span>Compute
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="meta-ledger">
    <div class="meta-cell"><div class="meta-k">Date</div><div class="meta-v">2026-06-27</div></div>
    <div class="meta-cell"><div class="meta-k">Samples</div><div class="meta-v">n = 0</div></div>
    <div class="meta-cell"><div class="meta-k">Features</div><div class="meta-v">0</div></div>
    <div class="meta-cell"><div class="meta-k">Passed QC</div><div class="meta-v">0%</div></div>
    <div class="meta-cell"><div class="meta-k">Notes</div><div class="meta-v">—</div></div>
  </div>
</div>

<section class="report-section" id="summary">
  <div class="section-head">
    <span class="section-num">01</span>
    <h2>Executive Summary</h2>
    <span class="section-count">Overview</span>
  </div>
  <p style="font-size:0.82rem; color:var(--steel); max-width:600px; margin-bottom:1.5rem; line-height:1.7">
    Replace this overview with a concise summary of the analysis.
  </p>
  <div class="metric-strip" style="grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr)">
    <div class="metric-cell hi"><div class="metric-k">Metric A</div><div class="metric-v">0</div><div class="metric-sub">subtitle</div></div>
    <div class="metric-cell"><div class="metric-k">Metric B</div><div class="metric-v">0</div><div class="metric-sub">subtitle</div></div>
    <div class="metric-cell"><div class="metric-k">Metric C</div><div class="metric-v">0%</div><div class="metric-sub">subtitle</div></div>
    <div class="metric-cell"><div class="metric-k">Metric D</div><div class="metric-v">0</div><div class="metric-sub">subtitle</div></div>
    <div class="metric-cell"><div class="metric-k">Metric E</div><div class="metric-v">0</div><div class="metric-sub">subtitle</div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="report-section" id="methods">
  <div class="section-head">
    <span class="section-num">02</span>
    <h2>Methods</h2>
    <span class="section-count">Pipeline versions</span>
  </div>
  <p style="font-size:0.8rem; color:var(--steel); margin-bottom:1rem">
    Describe the methods, tools, and parameters used in the analysis.
  </p>
</section>

<section class="report-section" id="results">
  <div class="section-head">
    <span class="section-num">03</span>
    <h2>Results</h2>
    <span class="section-count">Findings</span>
  </div>
  <p style="font-size:0.8rem; color:var(--steel); margin-bottom:1rem">
    Present your results here. Add figures, tables, and code blocks as needed.
  </p>
</section>

<section class="report-section" id="references">
  <div class="section-head">
    <span class="section-num">04</span>
    <h2>References</h2>
  </div>
  <ol class="ref-list">
    <li>Replace with citations.</li>
  </ol>
</section>

<div class="report-footer">
  <span>Bioinformatics Analysis Report</span>
  <span>Generated by the <a href="https://wordpress.kaderali.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Kaderali Lab · Institute of Bioinformatics</a>, Universitätsmedizin Greifswald</span>
</div>
``````
